strengths: Proven experience with diverse tech stacks and programming languages
Strong background in software development with a focus on testability and user experience
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows
concerns: Lack of direct experience in fintech infrastructure and regulated environments
No clear evidence of experience scaling engineering teams to 30+ people
Limited visibility of direct experience with agentic AI architecture at scale
response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development and experience with diverse tech stacks, including AI-agent infrastructure. However, there are concerns regarding direct experience in fintech and scaling large engineering teams.
